# self-improvement

Self-improvement skill vendored into this repository for OpenClaw and adjacent agent workflows. It captures learnings, errors, and feature requests without requiring a second install step.

## Attribution

Imported from ClawHub/upstream and then curated for this repo:

- https://github.com/pskoett/pskoett-ai-skills
- https://github.com/pskoett/pskoett-ai-skills/tree/main/skills/self-improvement

## Main File

- `SKILL.md`

## Repo-Local Notes

- Source of truth: `.github/skills/self-improvement/`
- Optional OpenClaw hook source: `.github/skills/self-improvement/hooks/openclaw`
- Optional helper scripts: `.github/skills/self-improvement/scripts/`
- This repo does not auto-enable the hook tree
